SEARCH

Uses of Package
com.nib.supernaut

Packages that use com.nib.supernaut
Package
Description
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.api
Public API interfaces exposing Supernaut services over Spring Cloud Functions.
com.nib.supernaut.backbone
Core infrastructure and distributed coordination interface for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.backbone.embedded
Embedded single-node implementation of Supernaut backbone.
com.nib.supernaut.cobol
COBOL interface and runtime support for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.commands
CICS-like commands API classes.
com.nib.supernaut.exceptions
Exceptions for Supernaut online errors.
com.nib.supernaut.extensions
Extension points and plugin mechanisms for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.files
File control and access management for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.jms
Java Message Service (JMS) integration for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.observability
Observability and monitoring interface for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.queues
Transient Data (TD) and Temporary Storage (TS) queue management for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.security
Security and authentication services for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.spool
Spooling interface for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.systran
System transactions for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.tcp
TCP/IP socket communication support for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.terminal
General terminal control and emulation handling for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.terminal.jsonterminal
JSON terminal services
com.nib.supernaut.terminal.printer
virtual printer terminal services
com.nib.supernaut.terminal.tn3270
TN3270 terminal services
com.nib.supernaut.web
CICS-like Web interface and HTTP services.
  • Classes in com.nib.supernaut used by com.nib.supernaut
    Class
    Description
    AbstractOnlineProgram.ISectionDelegate
     
    AdminMessage
     
    AdminMessage.Command
     
    Channel
    This class represents a Channel.
    CommandResponse
    Represents a command response with various attributes such as response codes, data, message, and additional metadata.
    ConnectionPoolConfig
     
    Dfheiblk
    This class represents the DFHEIBLK structure in CICS.
    ExecutionContext
     
    GetMainStorage
     
    HandleCondition
    This class represents a condition that can be handled in different ways.
    IRegionTransactionManager
    This interface defines the contract for a region transaction manager.
    NodeInfo
    This class represents the information of a node in the system.
    RegionStartMode
     
    RegionStatus
     
    Settable
     
    ShardingStrategy
     
    SupernautContext
    SupernautContext provides the contextual environment for executing online programs with services such as region management, terminal handling, task management, and subsystems.
    SupernautContext.StackEntry
    Represents a stack entry in the Supernaut context.
    SupernautContextBuilder
     
    SupernautRegion
     
    Task
    Represents a Task that is executed in the context of a specific region, terminal, and other associated subsystems.
    Task.TaskStatus
